name: ScanResponse
description: ScanResponse schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma AIRS API

status.description: Current or final status of the scan.

report_id.description: Identifier for the detailed scan report.

results.description: Per-content scan results corresponding to each submitted content item.

prompt_detected.description: Threats detected in the prompt field.

url_cats.description: Malicious URL categories detected in prompt.

dlp.description: Data loss prevention triggers in prompt.

response_detected.description: Threats detected in the response field.

url_cats.description: Malicious URL categories detected in response.

dlp.description: Data loss prevention triggers in response.

toxic_content.description: Toxic or harmful content detected in response.

verdict.description: Overall verdict for this content pair.

action.description: Action taken based on the security profile configuration.

tr_id.description: Transaction ID echoed from the request if provided.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the scan was submitted.
